name: mova-mcp
description: MOVA HITL contract execution — MCP server for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible client

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/index.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node'))fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);fs.chmodSync(p,0o755);"
